title: Telangana Govt to Distribute 2.66 Lakh 'Id Ka Tohfa' Packets; Allocates Funds for Iftar in 813 Mosques
description: Each packet consists of a sari with blouse piece, a chudidar top with chunni, and a kurta-pyjama. Each mosque has been extended ₹1 lakh for organising Iftar and facilitating community gatherings during Ramzan.
